source.section: response.created / ResponseCreatedEvent first schema JSON fence; reachable ResponseOutputItem graph
source.section_extraction: UTF-8 characters after the opening ```json marker through the character before the newline that opens the closing fence

semantics.scope: Every HttpDeclProperty with optional=true or nullable=true reachable from each of the 28 ResponseOutputItem variants. Shared schemas are retained once per item context.

legal_state_labels.null: The property key is present with JSON null.
legal_state_labels.present: The property key is present with a schema-valid non-null value.
